mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM routing r LEFT JOIN item i ON r.rout_item = i.item_id WHERE r.rout_usage = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(r.rout_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(r.rout_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT r.rout_id AS routId, r.rout_item AS routItem, r.rout_name AS routName, r.rout_content AS routContent, r.rout_usage AS routUsage,
i.item_id AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType, i.item_spec AS itemSpec, i.item_unit AS itemUnit
FROM routing r LEFT JOIN item i ON r.rout_item = i.item_id
WHERE r.rout_usage = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(r.rout_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{routDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(r.rout_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{routDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{routDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{routDTO.searchKeyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY r.rout_id DESC
) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}

SELECT r.rout_id AS routId, r.rout_item AS routItem, r.rout_name AS routName, r.rout_content AS routContent, r.rout_usage AS routUsage,
i.item_id AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType, i.item_spec AS itemSpec, i.item_unit AS itemUnit
FROM routing r LEFT JOIN item i ON r.rout_item = i.item_id
WHERE r.rout_id = #{routId}

SELECT rd.rout_dtl_id AS routDtlId, rd.rout_dtl_rout AS routDtlRout, rd.rout_dtl_step AS routDtlStep, rd.rout_dtl_proc AS routDtlProc, rd.rout_dtl_usage AS routDtlUsage,
p.proc_id AS procId, p.proc_name AS procName, p.proc_content AS procContent, p.proc_wp_type AS procWpType,
wt.wp_type_no AS wpTypeNo, wt.wp_type_name AS wpTypeName, wt.wp_type_content AS wpTypeContent,
( SELECT LISTAGG(e.eq_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.eq_name) FROM equipment e JOIN workplace w ON e.eq_wpid = w.wp_id WHERE w.wp_type = p.proc_wp_type AND w.wp_usage = 'Y' ) AS eqNames
FROM routing_detail rd LEFT JOIN process p ON rd.rout_dtl_proc = p.proc_id LEFT JOIN wp_type wt ON p.proc_wp_type = wt.wp_type_no
WHERE rd.rout_dtl_rout = #{routId} AND rd.rout_dtl_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY rd.rout_dtl_step ASC

SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType, item_spec AS itemSpec, item_unit AS itemUnit
FROM item
WHERE item_usage = 'Y' AND item_type IN (20, 30)
ORDER BY item_type ASC, item_id ASC

SELECT p.proc_id AS procId, p.proc_name AS procName, p.proc_content AS procContent, p.proc_wp_type AS procWpType,
wt.wp_type_no AS wpTypeNo, wt.wp_type_name AS wpTypeName, wt.wp_type_content AS wpTypeContent,
( SELECT LISTAGG(e.eq_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.eq_name) FROM equipment e JOIN workplace w ON e.eq_wpid = w.wp_id WHERE w.wp_type = p.proc_wp_type AND w.wp_usage = 'Y' ) AS eqNames
FROM process p LEFT JOIN wp_type wt ON p.proc_wp_type = wt.wp_type_no
WHERE p.proc_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY wt.wp_type_no ASC, p.proc_id ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ROUT' || ROUTING_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO routing ( rout_id, rout_item, rout_name, rout_content, rout_usage ) VALUES ( #{routId}, #{routItem}, #{routName}, #{routContent}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO routing_detail ( rout_dtl_id, rout_dtl_rout, rout_dtl_step, rout_dtl_proc, rout_dtl_usage ) VALUES ( 'RDTL' || ROUTING_DETAIL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{routDtlRout}, #{routDtlStep}, #{routDtlProc}, 'Y' )
